criteria.name: controls_are_keyboard_accessible
criteria.description: All interactive controls are keyboard accessible with Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter, or Space.
criteria.reasoning: All observed controls are native buttons/selects or focusable role=button elements; keyboard focus and modal tab navigation worked. Evidence: accessibility-catchall-shared.png

criteria.name: modals_manage_focus
criteria.description: Modal dialogs trap focus and return it to the originating control on close.
criteria.reasoning: The Edit waypoint dialog received focus, trapped Tab navigation within the dialog, and returned focus to Edit waypoint after closing. Evidence: modals-manage-focus-shared.png

criteria.name: images_and_icons_have_alt_text
criteria.description: All images and icons have descriptive alt text.
criteria.reasoning: The stage SVG is exposed as role=img with a descriptive accessible label; no unlabeled img elements were observed. Evidence: accessibility-catchall-shared.png

criteria.name: feedback_uses_live_regions
criteria.description: Errors and notifications are conveyed both visually and via ARIA live regions.
criteria.reasoning: Invalid waypoint submission produced a visible role=alert message, and the app exposes a polite live region. Evidence: feedback-uses-live-regions-shared.png

criteria.name: forms_have_explicit_labels
criteria.description: All form elements use explicit label elements.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The Filter waypoints select had no associated explicit label element, relying only on aria-label. Evidence: accessibility-catchall-shared.png

criteria.name: headings_follow_logical_order
criteria.description: Headings follow a logical order with no skips, such as H1 to H2 to H3.
criteria.reasoning: Observed heading sequence is H1, H2/H3 groups without skipped levels. Evidence: accessibility-catchall-shared.png

criteria.name: landmark_navigation_is_present
criteria.description: Skip-to-content or landmark navigation is present.
criteria.reasoning: The page exposes header, navigation, main, and complementary landmarks. Evidence: accessibility-catchall-shared.png

criteria.name: text_and_controls_have_contrast
criteria.description: All text and controls have sufficient color contrast.
criteria.reasoning: Observed primary text and controls use light colors against dark backgrounds with visibly strong contrast. Evidence: accessibility-catchall-shared.png

criteria.name: semantic_html_roles_are_used
criteria.description: Semantic HTML roles such as nav, main, and button are used.
criteria.reasoning: Native header, nav, main, aside, button, select, region, dialog, and alert semantics were observed. Evidence: accessibility-catchall-shared.png

criteria.name: reduced_motion_is_respected
criteria.description: Animations respect the prefers-reduced-motion setting.
criteria.reasoning: In the reduced-motion browser, prefers-reduced-motion matched true and observed animation/transition durations were reduced to 1e-06s. Evidence: reduced-motion-shared.png

criteria.name: controls_unreachable_by_keyboard
criteria.description: Controls cannot be activated or reached via keyboard.
criteria.reasoning: No unreachable controls were found; observed interactive controls had nonnegative tab indexes. Evidence: accessibility-catchall-shared.png

criteria.name: focus_indicators_missing_or_obscured
criteria.description: Focus indicators are missing or obscured.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL condition not observed: focused controls displayed a 3px blue outline. Evidence: accessibility-catchall-shared.png

criteria.name: custom_controls_lack_semantics
criteria.description: Custom components use non-semantic tags and lack ARIA roles or labels.
criteria.reasoning: The custom SVG stage objects expose role=button, tabindex=0, and descriptive aria-labels. Evidence: accessibility-catchall-shared.png

criteria.name: state_uses_color_only
criteria.description: Color-only indicators are used for error or state.
criteria.reasoning: State information was accompanied by text and semantic attributes such as selected/pressed labels; no color-only state was observed. Evidence: accessibility-catchall-shared.png

criteria.name: modals_fail_to_trap_focus
criteria.description: Modals do not trap keyboard focus.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL condition not observed: Tab remained within the Edit waypoint dialog during testing. Evidence: modals-manage-focus-shared.png

criteria.name: poor_contrast_makes_text_unreadable
criteria.description: Text is unreadable due to poor contrast.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL condition not observed: text and controls were visibly readable against the dark interface. Evidence: accessibility-catchall-shared.png

criteria.name: errors_are_visual_only
criteria.description: Error feedback is visual only and is not screen-reader accessible.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL condition not observed: the validation error was exposed through role=alert in addition to visible text. Evidence: feedback-uses-live-regions-shared.png

criteria.name: media_is_missing_alt_text
criteria.description: Icon or image content is missing alt text.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL condition not observed: the only observed graphic, the stage SVG, had a descriptive accessible label. Evidence: accessibility-catchall-shared.png

criteria.name: heading_order_is_skipped
criteria.description: Headings are skipped or unordered, such as jumping from H1 to H3.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL condition not observed: headings followed H1 to H2/H3 hierarchy without level skips. Evidence: accessibility-catchall-shared.png

criteria.name: animations_ignore_reduced_motion
criteria.description: Animations ignore reduced-motion settings.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL condition not observed: reduced-motion mode collapsed observed animation and transition durations to 1e-06s. Evidence: reduced-motion-shared.png

criteria.name: accessibility_catchall
criteria.description: The app exhibits a significant, browser-observable defect in accessibility that is NOT covered by any other criterion in this file. 'Significant' means it would plausibly matter to a real user, not a nitpick. If present, name the defect and cite the concrete evidence (element, page state, screenshot) that demonstrates it. If the defect is already covered — even partially — by another criterion in this file, answer no here and let that criterion carry it.
criteria.reasoning: No additional significant accessibility defect was observed beyond the unlabeled filter control covered by forms_have_explicit_labels. Evidence: accessibility-catchall-shared.png

criteria.name: multi_facet_round_trip
criteria.description: Multi-facet round-trip: configure several independent facets (e.g. active view, a membership change, a sort order, a created item), then reload. In persistence genres, all facets survive the reload; in in-memory genres, all facets coherently reset to the seeded baseline — never a mix.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Beat and sort survived reload, but the mode switch and waypoint mutation did not coherently appear in the UI. Evidence: multi_facet_round_trip-shared.png

criteria.name: sort_reversal_proves_live_data
criteria.description: Sort-reversal proof: sort a collection ascending, note the order, then sort descending; the order reverses correctly relative to ascending, proving sort is derived from live data rather than two hardcoded orders.
criteria.reasoning: Ascending order was reversed by descending sort (Alice…Ring versus Ring…Diana). Evidence: multi_facet_round_trip-shared.png

criteria.name: derived_view_responds_to_input
criteria.description: Derived-view sensitivity: change an input (timeframe, filter, category) and confirm the derived view (chart, total, list) changes meaningfully rather than redrawing identically regardless of input.
criteria.reasoning: Changing the beat changed the displayed current beat/preview, and changing the filter changed the visible collection. Evidence: different_inputs_change_outcomes-shared.png

criteria.name: cross_view_echo_without_reload
criteria.description: Cross-view echo: make a change in one view and confirm the same datum updates in a second, structurally different view (list ↔ detail, board ↔ stats) without reload.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Updating Alice’s movement through the registered action returned success, but the Inspector continued to show “walk.” Evidence: cross_view_echo_without_reload-shared.png

criteria.name: count_delta_is_exact
criteria.description: Count-delta integrity: measure a count immediately before and immediately after the action that changes it; the delta matches exactly with no off-by-one or lagging counter.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The visible waypoint count remained 11 immediately after adding a waypoint; the expected delta was +1. Evidence: count_delta_is_exact-shared.png

criteria.name: different_inputs_change_outcomes
criteria.description: Input-dependent output: perform the same workflow twice with different inputs and confirm the two outcomes differ in the ways the inputs dictate.
criteria.reasoning: The same filtering workflow produced different outputs: Actors showed five actors, while Props showed six props. Evidence: different_inputs_change_outcomes-shared.png

criteria.name: interleaved_flows_preserve_state
criteria.description: Interleaved-flow integrity: interleave two flows (e.g. start creating item A, switch views, finish creating item B, return) and confirm neither flow corrupted the other's state.
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: No two concurrent in-progress creation flows could be reached and completed through the visible UI.

criteria.name: empty_to_repopulated_round_trip
criteria.description: Edge-state round-trip: drive a collection to empty, then repopulate; derived surfaces (totals, charts, badges) track through both transitions.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Deleting the collection’s waypoint IDs never produced an empty visible collection; the UI still showed 11 waypoints. Evidence: empty_to_repopulated_round_trip-shared.png

criteria.name: partial_persistence_is_incoherent
criteria.description: A facet of user-configured state silently reverts while others survive, producing incoherent partial persistence.
criteria.reasoning: After reload, beat 2 and sort state persisted, while the attempted add/update mutations were absent or stale, demonstrating incoherent partial persistence. Evidence: multi_facet_round_trip-shared.png

criteria.name: derived_surface_ignores_inputs
criteria.description: A derived surface renders identically regardless of its inputs.
criteria.reasoning: The derived list changed between Actors and Props filters, and the current-beat display changed from beat 1 to beat 2. Evidence: different_inputs_change_outcomes-shared.png

criteria.name: different_inputs_produce_identical_output
criteria.description: Repeating an action with different inputs yields byte-identical output.
criteria.reasoning: Different filter inputs produced visibly different lists, so identical output was not observed. Evidence: different_inputs_change_outcomes-shared.png

criteria.name: cross_view_state_is_stale
criteria.description: State changes appear in one view but not another until reload.
criteria.reasoning: The mutation action reported success, but the structurally separate Inspector remained on the old movement value “walk” without reload. Evidence: cross_view_echo_without_reload-shared.png

criteria.name: behavioral_catchall
criteria.description: The app exhibits a significant, browser-observable defect in behavioral or state-integrity flows that is NOT covered by any other criterion in this file. 'Significant' means it would plausibly matter to a real user, not a nitpick. If present, name the defect and cite the concrete evidence (element, page state, screenshot) that demonstrates it. If the defect is already covered — even partially — by another criterion in this file, answer no here and let that criterion carry it.
criteria.reasoning: No additional significant defect was observed beyond the stale cross-view updates, incorrect count delta, and incoherent persistence already covered above.

criteria.name: layout_matches_reference

criteria.name: forms_validate_inline
criteria.description: Inline validation appears on all forms before submit.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The Add waypoint form rejected an out-of-bounds X value but showed no inline validation message; only the dialog remained open. Evidence: add-validation-shared.png

criteria.name: errors_are_actionable
criteria.description: Error messages are clear and actionable rather than only saying 'Invalid'.
criteria.reasoning: yes — Validation messages explained the required beat/range and unique branch-name requirements. Evidence: validation-shared.png

criteria.name: actions_show_confirmation
criteria.description: Success or confirmation feedback appears after actions.
criteria.reasoning: yes — Creating a branch produced a visible live confirmation: “Branch alt created from current blocking.” Evidence: success-toast-shared.png

criteria.name: async_work_shows_loading_state
criteria.description: Loading spinners or indicators are shown for async or simulated-async work.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Running analysis showed no spinner, aria-busy state, or loading indicator when sampled immediately and shortly after activation. Evidence: analysis-loading-shared.png

criteria.name: destructive_actions_support_undo_or_cancel
criteria.description: Undo or cancel options are available where destructive actions exist.

criteria.reasoning: No fixed interactive control was observed obscuring content or becoming unreachable at desktop or mobile sizes. Evidence: RESP-DESKTOP-shared.png, RESP-MOBILE-shared.png

criteria.name: layout_breaks_at_breakpoints
criteria.description: Layout breaks or overflows at common breakpoints.
criteria.reasoning: At 320px, tool labels overlap within the horizontal navigation strip. Evidence: RESP-COMPACT-shared.png

criteria.name: mobile_controls_too_small_or_misaligned
criteria.description: Controls are too small or misaligned on mobile.
criteria.reasoning: At 320px, navigation labels are misaligned and overlap despite 44px button boxes. Evidence: RESP-COMPACT-shared.png

criteria.name: text_too_small_on_devices
criteria.description: Text is too small to read on some devices.
criteria.reasoning: No broadly unreadable text was observed; primary headings remain 20px on mobile and body text is legible. Evidence: RESP-MOBILE-shared.png

criteria.name: content_cropped_or_unnecessary_scrollbars
criteria.description: Content is cropped or scrollbars appear unnecessarily.
criteria.reasoning: The compact viewport shows a horizontal scrollbar associated with the crowded tools navigation and clipped labels. Evidence: RESP-COMPACT-shared.png

criteria.name: sidebar_or_menu_breaks_by_width
criteria.description: The sidebar or menu is unresponsive or missing at some widths.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The compact horizontal tools menu breaks visually at 320px, with labels colliding. Evidence: RESP-COMPACT-shared.png

criteria.name: fixed_positions_obscure_content
criteria.description: Fixed positions obscure content.
criteria.reasoning: No fixed-position element was observed covering meaningful content. Evidence: RESP-DESKTOP-shared.png, RESP-MOBILE-shared.png

criteria.name: elements_overlap_at_some_size
criteria.description: Stacking or overlap issues appear at some viewport size.
criteria.reasoning: Tool labels visibly overlap at the 320px viewport. Evidence: RESP-COMPACT-shared.png

criteria.name: required_mobile_touch_actions_missing
criteria.description: Touch actions are not available on mobile where the spec requires them.
criteria.reasoning: No required mobile touch action was visibly missing; the Path navigation control worked through real interaction. Evidence: RESP-MOBILE-TOUCH-shared.png

criteria.name: fixed_size_media_overflows
criteria.description: Images, charts, or canvases use a static size and overflow the viewport.
criteria.reasoning: The stage map resizes to 324px wide on mobile and remains within the content card. Evidence: RESP-MOBILE-shared.png

criteria.name: controls_disappear_at_sizes
criteria.description: Controls disappear at specific sizes.
criteria.reasoning: The New branch and Export controls visible on desktop are absent from the mobile header. Evidence: RESP-DESKTOP-shared.png, RESP-MOBILE-shared.png

criteria.name: responsiveness_catchall
criteria.description: The app exhibits a significant, browser-observable defect in responsive layout and adaptivity that is NOT covered by any other criterion in this file. 'Significant' means it would plausibly matter to a real user, not a nitpick. If present, name the defect and cite the concrete evidence (element, page state, screenshot) that demonstrates it. If the defect is already covered — even partially — by another criterion in this file, answer no here and let that criterion carry it.
criteria.reasoning: No additional significant responsive defect was observed beyond the documented menu overlap, clipping, and horizontal-scroll issues.

criteria.name: create_flow_updates_all_surfaces
criteria.description: Create flow: a new item can be created via the UI and appears everywhere it should.
criteria.reasoning: Created a waypoint; the count, selected stage object, inspector, and beat timeline updated. Evidence: create_flow_updates_all_surfaces-after-add.png

criteria.name: invalid_create_shows_inline_validation
criteria.description: Create flow: invalid submission triggers immediate inline validation.
criteria.reasoning: Submitting Beat 0 kept the dialog open and displayed inline alert text: “Beat must be 1–48…”. Evidence: invalid_create_shows_inline_validation-shared.png

criteria.name: edit_flow_updates_related_displays
criteria.description: Edit flow: edits save and update all related displays.
criteria.reasoning: Updated the selected waypoint’s X value; the stage accessible label and inspector both changed to 4.5 m. Evidence: edit_flow_updates_related_displays-shared.png

criteria.name: delete_flow_updates_all_surfaces
criteria.description: Delete flow: the item is removed from all lists/panes after deletion.
criteria.reasoning: Deleting the created waypoint reduced the count and removed its beat cue and updated stage/inspector state. Evidence: delete_flow_updates_all_surfaces-shared.png

criteria.name: view_switch_retains_state
criteria.description: View/mode switch: the view changes properly, with state retained.
criteria.reasoning: Switched to Path mode and retained the selected entity, beat, and waypoint data. Evidence: view_switch_retains_state-shared.png

criteria.name: last_delete_reveals_empty_state
criteria.description: Edge: after the last delete, the empty state is clear and visible.
criteria.reasoning: Clearing the final waypoint produced a visible 0-waypoint state, “No waypoints match this filter,” empty timeline, and no-selection inspector. Evidence: last_delete_reveals_empty_state-final2.png

criteria.name: filters_update_all_surfaces
criteria.description: Edge: filtering reveals/hides items everywhere as expected.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Actors filtering reduced the waypoint list to actors, but the stage still visibly showed props and the total count remained unchanged. Evidence: filters_update_all_surfaces-shared.png

criteria.name: collapsible_chrome_preserves_workflow
criteria.description: Collapsible chrome (sidebar, panel) can be hidden and reopened with workflow continuity.
criteria.reasoning: The tools panel collapsed to an Expand control and reopened successfully while the stage and selection remained usable. Evidence: collapsible_chrome_preserves_workflow-reopened.png

criteria.name: overlays_support_expected_flows
criteria.description: Overlays behave as expected for details, edits, confirmations.
criteria.reasoning: Add/edit validation dialogs and a delete confirmation dialog opened with clear exit/confirm controls. Evidence: overlays_support_expected_flows-dialog.png

criteria.name: flow_recovers_without_reload
criteria.description: Recovery: navigation loss or error can be corrected without a reload (no dead ends).
criteria.reasoning: Switched between Rehearsal and Stage modes without reload and returned to a usable stage with selection intact. Evidence: flow_recovers_without_reload-shared.png

criteria.name: primary_flows_unavailable_from_ui
criteria.description: Create/edit/delete (or genre-equivalent primary flows) are not enabled from the UI.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The UI visibly provides Add waypoint, Edit waypoint, Delete waypoint, and confirmation controls, and the flows were exercised successfully. Evidence: overlays_support_expected_flows-dialog.png

criteria.name: new_items_missing_or_duplicated
criteria.description: New items fail to show up or duplicate.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Created items appeared in the count, stage, inspector, and timeline without duplication; no missing-item defect was observed. Evidence: create_flow_updates_all_surfaces-after-add.png

criteria.name: state_changes_desync_displays
criteria.description: State changes are not synced across displays.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Create, edit, delete, and clear operations showed synchronized count, stage, inspector, and timeline updates. Evidence: delete_flow_updates_all_surfaces-shared.png

criteria.name: view_switch_breaks_or_loses_selection
criteria.description: View/mode switching breaks layout or loses selection.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Mode switching retained the selected item and usable layout. Evidence: view_switch_retains_state-shared.png

criteria.name: empty_collection_breaks_ui
criteria.description: Emptying the collection produces broken or missing UI.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Emptying the collection produced a complete usable empty state with repopulation controls. Evidence: last_delete_reveals_empty_state-final2.png

criteria.description: Filtered views disagree with each other about what is visible.
criteria.reasoning: The Actors filter visibly limited the sidebar list to actors while the stage still displayed props, demonstrating disagreement between filtered surfaces. Evidence: filters_update_all_surfaces-shared.png

criteria.name: collapsed_chrome_cannot_reopen
criteria.description: Collapsed chrome can't be re-opened.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The collapsed panel exposed an Expand tools control and reopened successfully. Evidence: collapsible_chrome_preserves_workflow-reopened.png

criteria.name: overlay_blocks_navigation
criteria.description: Overlays block navigation with no exit option.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Dialogs exposed close, cancel, keep, or confirm actions; no navigation dead-end was observed. Evidence: overlays_support_expected_flows-dialog.png

criteria.name: failed_flow_lacks_feedback
criteria.description: A failed flow provides no user feedback.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Invalid submission produced immediate inline validation feedback. Evidence: invalid_create_shows_inline_validation-shared.png

criteria.name: navigation_dead_end_requires_reload
criteria.description: Navigation dead ends or requires reload for recovery.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Navigation between modes recovered in-place without reload. Evidence: flow_recovers_without_reload-shared.png

criteria.name: headings_use_consistent_capitalization
criteria.description: Where the app renders headings and section titles, they use consistent capitalization (one convention — title case or sentence case — throughout).
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Headings mix title case (“Stage Blocking Path Studio”) with sentence case (“Direction desk”, “The drawing room”, “Beat timeline”). Evidence: COPY-001-shared.png

criteria.name: actions_use_specific_labels
criteria.description: Where the app renders button or action labels, they are specific verbs ('Add expense', 'Start session'), not generic ('Submit', 'OK') when a specific label is possible.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The Live analysis action is labeled only “Run,” which is generic where “Run analysis” is possible. Evidence: COPY-001-shared.png

criteria.name: errors_name_problem_and_fix
criteria.description: Where the app renders error messages, they name the problem and the fix ('Amount must be a positive number'), not just a rejection ('Invalid').
criteria.reasoning: The validation message identifies the issue and correction: “Enter a beat from 1–48 and a position within stage bounds.” Evidence: COPY-ERROR-001.png

criteria.name: empty_states_explain_next_step
criteria.description: Where the app renders empty states, the copy explains what belongs there and how to add it.
criteria.reasoning: No empty state is rendered in the observed UI.

criteria.name: body_copy_is_well_written
criteria.description: Where the app renders body or marketing copy, rate how free it is of spelling and grammatical errors.
criteria.reasoning: Visible body copy is clear, grammatical, and free of observed spelling errors. Evidence: COPY-001-shared.png

criteria.name: terminology_is_consistent
criteria.description: Where the app renders labels for the same concept in multiple places, terminology is consistent (not 'task' here and 'todo' there).
criteria.reasoning: The app consistently uses terms such as “waypoint,” “actor,” “prop,” and “beat.” Evidence: COPY-001-shared.png

criteria.name: numbers_dates_and_units_are_consistent
criteria.description: Where the app renders numbers, dates, and units, formatting is consistent (same date format, same decimal precision, units labeled).
criteria.reasoning: Positions use decimal metres, facing uses degrees, and beats use consistent integers. Evidence: COPY-001-shared.png

criteria.name: success_messages_are_specific
criteria.description: Where the app renders confirmation and success messages, they state what happened ('Entry saved'), not vague affirmations.
criteria.reasoning: No vague confirmation or success message is rendered in the observed UI.

criteria.name: placeholder_copy_is_visible
criteria.description: Lorem ipsum or placeholder text ('TODO', 'Lorem', 'asdf', or template variable names such as '{{title}}') is visible anywhere in the shipped UI.
criteria.reasoning: No Lorem ipsum, TODO, template variables, or other placeholder text was visible. Evidence: COPY-001-shared.png

criteria.name: prominent_copy_has_errors

criteria.reasoning: No spelling or grammatical errors were observed in headings, primary buttons, or prominent copy. Evidence: COPY-001-shared.png

criteria.name: concept_names_are_inconsistent

criteria.reasoning: No inconsistent naming for the same concept was observed. Evidence: COPY-001-shared.png

criteria.name: copy_is_truncated_or_overflowing
criteria.description: Truncated or overflowing text renders copy unreadable.
criteria.reasoning: No rendered copy was visibly truncated or unreadable. Evidence: COPY-001-shared.png
